meta.project: Covenant Systems - AI Regulatory Compliance Platform

product_overview: A regulatory ingestion, normalization, embedding and reasoning platform that converts raw legal documents into Bronze→Silver→Gold layers and exposes APIs for browsing regulations, semantic search, policy-vs-regulation comparisons, dashboard statistics and data validation.
core_goals: Ingest and preserve source documents verbatim in a Bronze layer, then produce deterministic Silver section-level JSON and Gold embeddings/labels.
Provide reliable, auditable section-level retrieval (semantic + lexical) for regulatory materials to power RAG and compliance analysis.
Expose APIs for regulation browsing, semantic search, and automated policy-vs-regulation comparisons (single and multi-regulation heatmaps).
Surface dashboard statistics and validation checks for data integrity across Bronze/Silver/Gold layers.
Ship reusable sample policies for testing and reproducible evaluation.
Log and surface failures clearly; avoid hallucinations and maintain conservative, high-confidence labels in Gold.

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Endpoint to verify system health and get Bronze/Silver/Gold document counts and timestamped status for monitoring.
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive 200 with {status, timestamp, documents: {bronze, silver, gold}}
GET /health -> Receive 503 with {error: 'database_unavailable'} (service degraded)

features.name: Regulations API
features.description: List and browse regulatory documents, classifications, severity breakdowns, and section-level details for a selected regulation.
user_flows: GET /api/regulations -> Receive 200 with {regulations: [{id, document_type, jurisdiction, regulator, total_sections, obligations_count, prohibitions_count, definitions_count, severity_signal_breakdown}]}
GET /api/dashboard/documents -> Receive 200 with {documents: [{document_id, document_type, jurisdiction, regulator, section_count, classification_breakdown, severity_signal_breakdown}], total}
GET /api/dashboard/documents/pipeda -> Receive 200 with {document_id: 'pipeda', sections: [{section_id, title, body, classification, severity_signal, operational_areas}], total_sections}
GET /api/dashboard/documents/unknown-reg -> Receive 404 with {error: 'Document not found'}

features.name: Dashboard Stats
features.description: Aggregate metrics across all regulation sections (classifications, severity signals, operational areas, punitive obligations) for analytics and UI tiles.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/stats -> Receive 200 with {total_sections, total_documents, classifications, severity_signals, operational_areas, punitive_obligations}
GET /api/dashboard/stats -> Receive 500 with {error: 'stats_generation_failed', reason: 'database_timeout'}

features.name: Sample Policies
features.description: List bundled sample policy documents for testing and fetch full policy text and sections for evaluation and comparisons.
user_flows: GET /api/sample-policies -> Receive 200 with {policies: [{id, name, filename, sections_count}]}
GET /api/sample-policies/quicklend_privacy_notice -> Receive 200 with {policy_name, filename, sections, raw_text}
GET /api/sample-policies/nonexistent -> Receive 404 with {error: 'Sample policy not found'}

features.name: Single Regulation Comparison
features.description: Compare a policy (uploaded or selected sample) against a single regulation using embeddings and/or LLM reasoning to produce coverage, gaps, partial matches and scores.
user_flows: POST /api/compare with body {sample_policy_id: 'quicklend_privacy_notice', regulation_id: 'pipeda', threshold: 0.8} -> Receive 200 with {score, total_obligations, covered, gaps, partial, matches, gap_details, partial_details, coverage_by_area}
POST /api/compare with body {policy_text: '...', regulation_id: 'pipeda', threshold: 0.8} -> Receive 200 with {score, covered, gaps, partial, matches}
POST /api/compare with body {sample_policy_id: 'quicklend_privacy_notice', regulation_id: 'unknown_reg', threshold: 0.8} -> Receive 404 with {error: 'Policy or regulation not found'}
POST /api/compare with body {} (no policy_text and no sample_policy_id) -> Receive 400 with {error: 'No sections found'}

features.name: Multi-Regulation Comparison (Heatmap)
features.description: Evaluate a policy across all available regulations and operational areas to return a risk heatmap and per-regulation summaries (costly LLM mode available).
user_flows: POST /api/compare-all with body {sample_policy_id: 'quicklend_privacy_notice', threshold: 0.75} -> Receive 200 with {policy_id, evaluated_at, regulations[], operational_areas[], heatmap, summary, details} (note: may take 2-3 minutes with LLM)
POST /api/compare-all with body {policy_text: '...'} -> Receive 200 with {policy_id, heatmap, summary, details}
POST /api/compare-all with body {} -> Receive 400 with {error: 'No sections found'}

features.name: Semantic Search
features.description: FAISS-backed semantic similarity search over regulation sections and gold embeddings for retrieval-augmented workflows.
user_flows: GET /search?query=breach%20notification%20requirements&top_k=5 -> Receive 200 with {results: [{section_id, title, body, score, document}], query, count}
GET /search?query=breach%20notification%20requirements -> Receive 500 with {error: 'FAISS index not found'}

features.name: Data Validation
features.description: Run integrity and consistency checks across Bronze, Silver and Gold layers and report missing items, errors, and warnings to support safe ingestion and QA.
user_flows: GET /validate -> Receive 200 with {valid: true, errors: [], warnings: []}
GET /validate -> Receive 200 with {valid: false, errors: ['missing_gold_embeddings_for_document: pipeda'], warnings: ['inconsistent_section_numbering: bank_act_2025']}
GET /validate -> Receive 500 with {error: 'validation_service_error', reason: 'database_connection_failed'}

endpoints.description: Run validation checks on Bronze/Silver/Gold layers

known_limitations.issue: Multi-regulation comparison takes 2-3 minutes on Groq free tier due to rate limits
known_limitations.impact: Users must wait with no progress indicator

known_limitations.issue: No auth enforcement on API endpoints (auth is frontend-only via Clerk)
Render free tier sleeps after 15 min inactivity (50s cold start)
known_limitations.impact: First request after sleep is slow
